name: Sure.jell® Nectarine Jam
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 cups prepared fruit (about 3 lbs. fully ripe nectarines)
recipeInstructions:
(about 3 lbs. fully ripe nectarines) Bring jars to a boil on a rack in a large pot filled with water for 10 minutes. Place flat lids in a saucepan with water and bring to a boil. Remove from heat; let jars and lids sit in hot water until ready to fill. Drain well before filling.
Pit and finely chop nectarines. Measure into a 6- or 8-quart saucepot. Add lemon juice.
Measure sugar into a separate bowl, scraping excess with a spatula for an exact level.
Stir pectin into the fruit in the saucepot until dissolved.
Bring to a full rolling boil on high heat, stirring constantly.
Quickly stir in all sugar. Return to a full rolling boil and boil exactly 1 minute, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
Skim foam with a metal spoon.
Ladle quickly into prepared jars, filling to within 1/8 inch of the top.
Wipe jar rims and threads. Cover with two-piece lids.
Screw bands tightly. Invert jars for 5 minutes, then turn upright. After jars are cool, check seals. Makes about 8 (1-cup) jars. Alternatively, follow the water bath method recommended by the USDA.
